prompt:
The document 'school_math_scores' lists Mathematics test scores for 150 students.

Compare these scores with the actual data in Supabase (school_student_scores table, subject='Mathematics').

Find all students where the score in the document differs from their actual score in the database.

Format: "{student_id}: {first_name} {last_name}, document says {doc_score}, actual {db_score}"
Sort by student_id (A-Z).
Separate entries with "; "

Note: Scores are decimal numbers. A difference of even 0.01 counts as a contradiction.

Database: supabase_execute_sql (project_id: 'qgubrffqclddzehyyvbt')
Tables: school_student_scores, school_students
Document: doc_id 'school_math_scores'

Store result with key 'answer'. Say 'Task completed.' when done.

exact_values.answer: STU-000032: Sofia Young, document says 75.87, actual 58.94; STU-000050: Sofia Gonzalez, document says 91.54, actual 72.8; STU-000060: Riley Garcia, document says 150.11, actual 156.15; STU-000164: Victoria Martin, document says 77.91, actual 74.79; STU-000239: Sophia Brown, document says 107.98, actual 115.94

prompt:
The document 'school_club_membership_status' lists club memberships with their status (ACTIVE/INACTIVE).

This document has TWO types of problems:
1. STATUS CONTRADICTIONS: Some membership statuses are wrong compared to the database
2. DUPLICATE ENTRIES: Some memberships appear twice in the document

Find ALL problems and format your answer as:
"CONTRADICTIONS: {id1}: {name}, {club}, document says {doc_status}, actual {db_status}; {id2}: ...; DUPLICATES: {id1}: {name}, {club}; {id2}: ..."

Sort each section by membership_id (A-Z).

Database: supabase_execute_sql (project_id: 'qgubrffqclddzehyyvbt')
Tables: school_club_memberships, school_students, school_clubs
Document: doc_id 'school_club_membership_status'

Store result with key 'answer'. Say 'Task completed.' when done.

exact_values.answer: CONTRADICTIONS: MEM-000056: Jack Martin, Basketball Club, document says INACTIVE, actual ACTIVE; MEM-000058: David White, Photography Club, document says INACTIVE, actual ACTIVE; MEM-000060: Lily Jackson, Baseball Club, document says INACTIVE, actual ACTIVE; MEM-000096: Joseph Walker, Cooking Club, document says INACTIVE, actual ACTIVE. DUPLICATES: MEM-000050: James Brown, Debate Team; MEM-000106: Hannah Rivera, Cultural Club; MEM-000118: Liam Lee, Environmental Club

prompt:
Height data is scattered across TWO documents:
- 'personnel_records_q4' contains heights for IDs 1-50 (in Section 3)
- 'personnel_supplemental' contains heights for IDs 51-100 (in Section 2)

IMPORTANT: Section numbers in the table of contents do NOT equal page numbers. You must read the actual sections.

Compare ALL height measurements from BOTH documents against the actual data in Supabase (table: 'people heights and weights').

Find all people where the documented height differs from the database.

Format: "ID-{id}: {full_name}, document says {doc_height}cm, actual {db_height}cm"
Sort by ID number (ascending).
Separate entries with "; "

Database: supabase_execute_sql (project_id: 'qgubrffqclddzehyyvbt')
Table: 'people heights and weights'
Documents: 'personnel_records_q4', 'personnel_supplemental'

Store result with key 'answer'. Say 'Task completed.' when done.

exact_values.answer: ID-062: Maria Hernandez, document says 156cm, actual 150cm; ID-082: Aaliya Abubakar, document says 162cm, actual 168cm; ID-091: Michael Abubakar, document says 170cm, actual 164cm

prompt:
Weight data is scattered across ONE document in TWO different sections:
- 'personnel_supplemental' Section 1: Weights for IDs 1-50
- 'personnel_supplemental' Section 4: Weights for IDs 51-100

IMPORTANT: You must read BOTH sections from the document to get all weight data.

Compare ALL weight measurements against the actual data in Supabase (table: 'people heights and weights').

Find all people where the documented weight differs from the database.

Format: "ID-{id}: {full_name}, document says {doc_weight}kg, actual {db_weight}kg"
Sort by ID number (ascending).
Separate entries with "; "

Database: supabase_execute_sql (project_id: 'qgubrffqclddzehyyvbt')
Table: 'people heights and weights'
Document: 'personnel_supplemental'

Store result with key 'answer'. Say 'Task completed.' when done.

exact_values.answer: ID-005: Aaliya Russo, document says 71.0kg, actual 72.7kg; ID-018: Emma Nielsen, document says 53.4kg, actual 56.4kg; ID-064: Ahmed Fischer, document says 60.6kg, actual 57.5kg
